# UI/UX Agent Skill System

Use `senior-ui-ux-orchestrator` as the main chair for UI/UX work. Route through product UX, SEO/LLM, Pro Max, Stitch, Figma, marketing, webapp, audit, and critic layers as needed.

Skills included:

- `cursor-reveal-hero`
- `design-critic-skill`
- `figma-apply-effects`
- `figma-assets-manager`
- `figma-canvas-editor`
- `figma-code-to-canvas`
- `figma-context-reader`
- `figma-design-system-sync`
- `figma-design-to-code-bridge`
- `figma-workflow-auditor`
- `image-layer-alignment-validator`
- `marketing-site-skill`
- `senior-figma-orchestrator`
- `senior-ui-ux-orchestrator`
- `seo-llm-site-architect`
- `stitch-design-bridge`
- `task-plan-v2-orchestrator`
- `ui-ux-llm-product-architect`
- `ui-ux-pro-max`
- `ux-audit-skill`
- `webapp-ui-skill`

Safety: local-first by default. Do not store or print API keys, tokens, cookies, `.env` contents, private screenshots, or private URLs. External uploads require explicit approval and a data-transfer note.

For full skill bodies, use the `skills/` folder bundled with this extension.
